extraction.one_line_summary: DAINESE Alberto won bunch sprint after teammate Kisshoff's illness gave him DSM's free card, beating favorite sprinters via Baldi leadout
tactical_patterns: Breakaway caught 90km out despite 5min gap shows peloton extremely wary of crosswind splits on flat stages.
CARAPAZ took intermediate sprint bonuses 75km out to jump GC positions, rare aggressive sprinting from climber on flat.
DSM pivoted leadout to DAINESE when designated sprinter KOOIJ felt unwell, fresher legs hypothesis beat dedicated trains.

rider_signals.DAINESE Alberto: positive: first WT win beating Gaviria/Ewan/Cavendish suggests he's been miscast as domestique, not primary sprinter
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: caught in early splits 90km out on flat stage reveals positioning weakness ahead of mountain stages
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: aggressively took intermediate bonuses 75km out to gain GC position, unusually tactical for climber on flat
rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: neutral: following wrong wheels despite UAE leadout positioning shows disconnect with Richeze's setup work
rider_signals.KOOIJ Olav: negative: illness forced DSM to pivot leadout, removing him from sprint contention entirely
